title: WHIMZEES By Wellness Variety Box Dental, Mixed Shapes, Size L, 14 Pieces, Natural and Grain Free Dog Chews, Dog Dental Sticks for Large Breeds, No Added Sugar
features: NEW PACKAGING: A brand new look for WHIMZEES By Wellness! Don't worry - there is still the same goodness inside, our recipes remain unchanged. Please be aware that depending on the time of your order, you might still receive our old packaging. We thank you for your understanding.
DAILY DENTAL CARE FOR DOGS: Our treats not only complement every dog’s daily food routine, but they also prevent dental plaque up to 80 percent better than other leading dental treats.
PREVENTS BAD BREATH AND TARTAR BUILD-UP: Our Triple Care dental care for dogs reduces plaque, fights tartar and combats bad breath of dogs. For good oral hygiene!

LOW IN CALORIES AND FAT: WHIMZEES By Wellness snacks are hypoallergenic and vegetarian and contain only pure natural ingredients. No artificial colours, flavours, preservatives or GMO. Only the best is good enough for your dog!
LONGER CHEWING TIME: Our dog treats allow 3 times longer chewing time compared to competitors. Hard chewing sticks with a solid structure for long chewing fun and effective dental care.
LARGE BREED DOGS: Our snacks are specially designed for dogs of large breeds (body weight 18-27 kg). Not for dogs under 9 months. One snack per day.
